summary: Gruber announces the annual Talk Show Live from WWDC 2025, recorded at The California Theatre in San Jose with guests Joanna Stern and Nilay Patel. The post highlights the show's 3D video with spatial audio version coming to Vision Pro via Sandwich Vision's Theater app, noting significant quality improvements over last year. He promotes the show's sponsors and credits Sandwich for the 4K production quality.
key_points: The Talk Show Live from WWDC 2025 featured Joanna Stern and Nilay Patel discussing Apple's announcements
The 3D spatial video version for Vision Pro represents a notable quality improvement over last year's version
The on-demand 3D version significantly outperforms the bandwidth-constrained livestream
The show was shot and mastered in 4K by Sandwich production company
money_quotes: Better than last year's by a long shot, and also significantly better than the bandwidth-constrained livestream Tuesday night.
The livestream Tuesday night looked good; the on-demand version coming in a few days looks pretty amazing.
As ever, I implore you to watch on the biggest screen you can (real, or virtual).
All credit and thanks for that go to my friends at Sandwich, who are nothing short of a joy to work with.
We once again shot and mastered the video in 4K, and it looks and sounds terrific.
key_insight: The Talk Show's 3D spatial video on Vision Pro is maturing as a format, with meaningful year-over-year quality improvements suggesting the medium is finding its footing.
